title: lotus discolor
intro: Lotus discolor, also known as the yellow lotus or Nelumbo lutea, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of lotus discolor include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections, as well as improve digestion and boost the immune system. Lotus discolor is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
